DP.269.0003:
Professor, there isn’t anything out
of the ordinary on the other side,\r
either!\f
DP.269.0004:
Professor, there’s nothing out of the
ordinary on the other side, either!\f
DP.269.0005:
Professor: Hmm...
I may have been mistaken...\f
Something appears to be different
than it was before, but...\f
Fine! It’s enough that we have
seen the lake.\f
DP.269.0007:
Dawn: Professor, how are you enjoying
being back in Sinnoh?\f
After being away for four years,
it must be exciting again?\f
DP.269.0008:
Lucas: Professor, you’ve been gone
for four years now.\f
How are you enjoying being back in
Sinnoh?\f
DP.269.0009:
Professor: ...Hm.
There is one thing I can say.\f
There are many rare kinds of Pokémon
in Sinnoh.\f
The region should serve us very well
in regard to our studies.\f
DP.269.0010:
Professor: Excuse me.
Let us pass, please.\f
DP.269.0011:
Dawn: I beg your pardon...
We’ll be on our way.\f
DP.269.0013:
[0103,0000]: What was that about?
Those two...\f
DP.269.0014:
Huh? [0103,0000]!
Let’s go check this out!\f
DP.269.0015:
...
...\f
What’s that?
Don’t go into the tall grass?\f
No problem, no problem!\f
We won’t be in there long enough
for a wild Pokémon to come out.\f
DP.269.0016:
It’s...
A briefcase?\f
Those people forgot it here.
What are we supposed to do with it?\f
We can try to deliver it, but who are
they? I heard them say professor...\f
DP.269.0019:
[0103,0000]: Fwaaah!
Your [0100,0001] totally rocked!\f
But my [0100,0002] was way tougher
than yours!\f
...They were other people’s
Pokémon, though...\f
But we had to use them...
They won’t mind, will they?\f
DP.269.0020:
Dawn: Oh! There’s the briefcase!\f
The professor would have been furious
if I’d lost it...\f
DP.269.0021:
Dawn: Huh?
Oh, no!\f
Did you...
Did you use the Pokémon in here?\f
You did?! Oh, my gosh!
What’s the professor going to say...?\f
...This is so not good...
I’ll take this briefcase for now.\f
DP.269.0022:
Lucas: Whew! You found the briefcase?\f
The professor would’ve gone through
the roof if he knew I forgot it here.\f
DP.269.0023:
Lucas: Hunh?
Whaaaat?!\f
Did you guys...
Did you use these Pokémon?!\f
Oh, man... How am I gonna explain
this to the professor?\f
...This briefcase is the professor’s,
so I’ll take it, OK?\f
DP.269.0025:
I don’t know what’s going on.
[0103,0000], let’s get out of here.\f
My Pokémon got hurt from that
battle.\f
If we get attacked by another
Pokémon, we might be in trouble.\f
DP.269.0026:
Rowan: Hmmm...\f
No legendary Pokémon, nothing out
of the ordinary...\f
[0103,0000], how was Lake Valor?
Anything to report?\f
What? You’re just going there now?
You’ve got to move faster than that!
DP.269.0027:
Rowan: [0103,0000], how was Lake
Valor? Anything to report?\f
What? You’re just going there now?
You’ve got to move faster than that!
DP.269.0028:
Dawn: [0103,0000], how was
Lake Valor?\f
There’s nothing wrong here.
The lake hasn’t changed at all.\f
We haven’t found a legendary
Pokémon, either, though...
DP.269.0029:
Lucas: Hiya, [0103,0000]!
How’s Lake Valor?\f
There’s nothing wrong here.
The lake is ordinary, as usual.\f
There’s no legendary Pokémon,
either...
